channel.title: Cybersecurity on Terminal
channel.description: Recent content in Cybersecurity on Terminal

item.title: This is my second blog
item.description:
Okay then, I was able to done this HUGO project which converts markdown file into HTML and have variety of themes available to choose and make it happen as blogs or anything you want on internet. With Hostinger it was more easy and now with a PS1 script it became more easy to do !!

Github Instagram Website

![[20241108_210710.jpg]]
item.content:
Okay then, I was able to done this HUGO project which converts markdown file into HTML and have variety of themes available to choose and make it happen as blogs or anything you want on internet. With Hostinger it was more easy and now with a PS1 script it became more easy to do !!

Github Instagram Website

![[20241108_210710.jpg]]
